title: The Man in the Brown Suit
author: Agatha Christie
description: After the death of her father, an archaeologist, Anne Beddingfeld finds herself completely penniless. She has lived in the country all her life. Now she wants to build a new, independent existence in London. Returning from an unsuccessful job interview, she is standing on the platform of the Hyde Park Corner subway station. She faces a man, who looks over her shoulder and is so startled that he staggers, falls onto the tracks and is killed. A doctor is immediately on the scene, but can only pron
